howItWorks.intro: This football qb rating calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: NFL Passer Rating
rules.explanation: Four components: completion%, yards/att, TD%, INT%.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: What is a perfect passer rating?
faq.a: 158.3 is the maximum NFL passer rating.

faq.q: What is an average QB rating?
faq.a: Around 85-90 is league average in the modern NFL.
